titleStmt.title: SII 16.49: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 49. (A.R. No. 180 of 1913.) BUKKAPAṬṆAM, PENUGONDA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a rock near the temple.
This is dated Āṅgīrasa, [Āśvīja] śu. 12, Wednesday. In the king's reign the cyclic year Āṅgīrasa corresponded with the Śaka year 1434 and so the details may be equated to 1512 A.D., September 22.

The epigraph is damaged at the beginning. It registers that the dēvadāya and brahmadāya lands under the tank Krottacheruvu in Penugoṇḍa-rājya which had been held rent-free (sarvamānya) from the time of Chikka Oḍeyalu had been re-assessed on account of certain disturbances in the interval. The king, now at Sivanasamudram on state business, ordered that the lands might be restored as before and this was announced on the occasion of the laksha-hōma ceremony conducted at Penugoṇḍa. Kūnamanāyaḍu had this inscription engraved under orders of Rāyasam Koṇḍamarasayya Dēmarasayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
Agunēṭi Āṁgirasa
ba śu12 bu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
ya mahārāyala rāyasaṁ koṁḍamarasayya
lāśāsanakramamu penugoṁḍarājya krottaceṟuvukiṁda dēvadā
ya braṁhmadāyālaku kaligina mānyālu cikkoḍayala kā
laṁ mōdalugānu sarvamānyamai naḍastāUṁḍagānu ma
dhyē Avāṁtarālai vaccina Avanāyālaina rokhadhānyālu kṛṣṇarāya ma
hārāyalu śivanasamudraṁ rācakāryānaku viccēśi Appuḍu Ānati
ccina kramānanu penugoṁḍalōnu lakṣahōmaṁ śēyiṁci Ā pūrṇā
huti samayakālamaṁdu Ī dēvadāya brahmadāyālu pūThe medial ī is written ña
rvamariyādane sarvamānyaṁgānu viḍistimi Ī dharmaṁ ĀcaṁThe medial ī is written ña
drārkamai naḍavagaladi Ī dharmamu yavvaru naḍapiri vāru pāla
nādacyutaṁ padaṁ Ani vāru Accutapadamaṁdu Uṁḍagalavā
ru Ī dharmānaku yavvaru tappiri vāru tama mātāpitāḷanu vāraThe medial ī is written ña
ṇāśiyaṁdu caṁppina pāpāna pōduru gaṁgalōna kapila
caṁppina pāpāna pōduru tama mātāpitṛlanē caṁpi narakaṁ
lō tōśē pāpāna pōduru Ēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sarvēṣā
mēva bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōjya na karagrāṁhyā vipradattā
vasuṁdharā . Ani śāstraṁ Uṁnadi gāna tama tōṁbuṭṭuku
tāme tappinavāru . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimiḥ . Anu Ī mariyādaku koṁḍamarasa
yya dēmarasayyagāri Ānatini kūnamanāyaḍu
vēyiṁcina śilāśāsanaṁ maṁgaḷamahā
śrīśrīśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
